channel.title: Posts on sun.ao's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on sun.ao's blog

item.title: Hugo + Github Pages 搭建 Blog
item.description: 安装hugo # windows https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases # macOS brew install hugo 初始化 # hugo-blog 为自定义文件夹 hugo new site hugo-blog cd hugo-blog # 下载主题 （根据需求自定） git init git submodule add https://github.com/sun-ao/mogege themes/mogege # 模版演示 cp -R themes/mogege/exampleSite/content . # 调试 hugo server 发布 hugo cd
